query:
-- Total count of prospects who received broken-link emails but haven't submitted
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rp.id) as affected_count
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
JOIN recruitment_emails_sent res ON res.prospectId = rp.id
WHERE res.emailKey IN ('followup_day3', 'followup_day7', 'followup_day14', 're_engagement_june_2026')
  AND rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NULL
  AND rp.pipelineStage = 'new_enquiry';

-- How did the 10 successful submissions come in? What emails did they receive?
SELECT 
  rp.id, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.applicationSubmittedAt,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT res.emailKey ORDER BY res.sentAt SEPARATOR ', ') as emailsReceived
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
LEFT JOIN recruitment_emails_sent res ON res.prospectId = rp.id
WHERE rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY rp.id, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.applicationSubmittedAt
ORDER BY rp.applicationSubmittedAt DESC;
